attributes.name: [Couchbase] Sync Gateway error and warning rate high

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-couchbase.resource-default
| STATS err_rate = SUM(RATE(couchbase.resource.error.count)),
    warn_rate = SUM(RATE(couchbase.resource.warn.count))
| EVAL combined_rate = err_rate + warn_rate
| WHERE combined_rate > 0.1
